title: A foundation built for scale: Dismantling carbon dependency in India’s power sector
description: India’s strategic green energy blueprintAt the COP26 Summit in Glasgow, India unveiled the Panchamrit vision, establishing an ambitious national trajectory for its renewable energy goals. Central to this strategy is scaling non fossil energy capacity to 500 GW by 2030. Under its updated Nationally Determined Contribution framework, the country is committed to achieving approximately 50% cumulative electric power capacity from non-fossil fuel-based resources by the end of the decade.This comprehe
